zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Ferrers於1166年2月21日出生在英國盧特藍德歐阿哈姆時，她的父親William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby30歲，母親Sybil de Braose32歲。她去世於1252年4月29日在英國格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯享年86歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Ferrers于1166年2月21日出生在英国盧特藍德歐阿哈姆时，她的父亲William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby30岁，母亲Sybil de Braose32岁。她去世于1252年4月29日在英国格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯享年86岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾萊拉德--坦斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Ferrers was born on 21 February 1166, in Oakham, Rutland, England, her father, William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby, was 30 and her mother, Sybil de Braose, was 32. She died on 29 April 1252, in Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Ferrers est née le 21 février 1166, à Oakham, Rutland, Angleterre, son père, William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Braose, avait 32 ans. Elle est décédée le 29 avril 1252, à Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Ferrers am 21. Februar 1166 in Oakham, Rutland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby 30 und ihre Mutter Sybil de Braose 32. Sie starb am 29. April 1252 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Ferrers è nata il il 21 febbraio 1166 nel Oakham, Rutland, England, sua padre, William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Sybil de Braose, aveva 32 anni. Morì il 29 aprile 1252, nel Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Ferrersが1166年2月21日にイギリスルトランドオアクハムで生まれた時，父William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derbyは30歳，母Sybil de Braoseは32歳であった。彼女は1252年4月29日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアレチラデ-オン-サムスで86歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアレチラデ-オン-サムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Ferrers(이)가 1166년 2월 21일 영국 루틀랜드 카에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil de Braose(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1252년 4월 29일 영국 그루스스터실르 렉h라데--섬스에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 렉h라데--섬스에 묻혔다.

pt.21 February 1166–29 April 1252: 21 de fevereiro de 1166–29 de abril de 1252
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Ferrers nasceu em 21 de fevereiro de 1166, em Oakham, Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Braose, tinha 32 anos. Ela faleceu em 29 de abril de 1252, em Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Ferrers родилась 21 февраля 1166 г. в местности оахам, рутланд, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Braose, 32. Она умерла 29 апреля 1252 г. в местности лечладе-он-тамесь, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности лечладе-он-тамесь, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.21 February 1166–29 April 1252: 21 de febrero de 1166–29 de abril de 1252
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella de Ferrers nació el 21 de febrero de 1166, en Oakham, Rutland, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Ferrers 3rd Earl of Derby, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Sybil de Braose, tenía 32 años. Murió el 29 de abril de 1252, en Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Lechlade-On-Thames, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
